N1 anxiety            | mod  | expresses some dread about English class and worries about relationship communication
N2 hostility          | none | 
N3 depression         | mod  | mentions feeling tired and low energy, but also excitement about seeing boyfriend
N4 self-conscious     | mod  | feels strange about relationship and worries about not talking enough with boyfriend
N5 impulsiveness      | low  | reflects on procrastination but does not act on immediate urges to write
N6 vulnerability      | mod  | feels overwhelmed by writing assignments and expresses frustration with relationship
E1 warmth             | high | expresses happiness and excitement about boyfriend and relationship
E2 gregariousness     | low  | prefers to listen to roommate rather than engage in social interactions
E3 assertiveness      | low  | does not take initiative in conversations, often listens instead
E4 activity           | mod  | mentions feeling energetic at times but also feeling tired and unmotivated
E5 excitement-seek    | high | shows enthusiasm for upcoming events like the music festival
E6 positive emotion   | high | expresses joy and excitement about seeing boyfriend soon
O1 fantasy            | none | 
O2 aesthetics         | none | 
O3 feelings           | high | demonstrates emotional depth regarding relationship and personal feelings
O4 actions/variety    | mod  | shows some openness to new experiences but also a tendency to procrastinate
O5 ideas              | mod  | reflects on past experiences and thoughts about English class
O6 values             | none | 
A1 trust              | mod  | expresses some doubt about boyfriend's commitment but also affection
A2 straightforward    | mod  | shares feelings honestly but also holds back in some situations
A3 altruism           | n/e  | 
A4 compliance         | low  | does not conform to group decision about the hall meeting
A5 modesty            | none | 
A6 tender-minded      | high | shows empathy and understanding towards her own feelings and those of her boyfriend
C1 competence         | low  | expresses feelings of inadequacy regarding English exam performance
C2 order              | none | 
C3 dutifulness        | low  | procrastinates on writing assignments and does not follow through
C4 achievement        | low  | expresses regret about not trying harder on the AP exam
C5 self-discipline    | low  | admits to putting off writing until the last minute
C6 deliberation       | mod  | reflects on past experiences but does not plan ahead for writing tasks

[LINGUISTIC]
pronouns:  high density of first-person pronouns indicating personal focus
emotion:   mixed balance with a dominant positive affect towards relationships
tense:     present emphasis with some reflections on past experiences
cognitive: moderate insight with some causal connections about feelings and actions
social:    low density of social-process words, focusing more on personal thoughts
register:  informal and exploratory with a casual tone
length:    approximately 400 words, varied sentence style with some run-ons

E4.evidence: mentions exercising and studying but also feeling tired and overwhelmed.

E6.evidence: feels good after a hug from her sister but also expresses worry and fatigue.

O3.evidence: shows emotional depth in discussing family relationships and personal worries.

O4.evidence: expresses a desire to achieve goals and engage in various activities but feels constrained.

A1.evidence: expresses some belief in her parents' intentions but feels restricted by their rules.

A4.evidence: shows some deference to parental rules but also expresses disagreement with them.

A5.evidence: downplays her achievements and feels inadequate compared to peers.

A6.evidence: expresses empathy for her sister and values their relationship despite conflicts.

C1.evidence: feels motivated to improve academically but doubts her current capabilities.

C3.evidence: expresses a desire to meet obligations but feels overwhelmed by academic pressures.

C4.evidence: shows ambition to get into med school and is motivated to improve her GPA.

C5.evidence: mentions exercising and studying but also feels distracted and tired.
